consultation.metadata_description: Register for advice on degree programs and admissions pathways at the College of Engineering and Technology, Vinh University.
consultation.page_description: Tell us what you would like to know. Our admissions team will contact you with clear guidance tailored to your needs.
consultation.benefit_questions_description: Degree programs, admissions pathways, tuition fees, and career opportunities.
consultation.benefit_contact_description: The admissions team will call the phone number you provide.
consultation.benefit_audience_description: Clear, practical information for your situation.
consultation.disclaimer: Submitting this form is not an official application. The admissions team will guide you through any next steps.
consultation.callout_title: Need help choosing a program or admissions pathway?
consultation.callout_description: Share your details and receive admissions guidance tailored to your needs, free of charge.
consultation.success_description: Thank you for your interest. Our admissions team will contact the phone number you provided as soon as possible.
consultation.message_placeholder: What would you like to know about programs, admissions pathways, or tuition fees?
consultation.consent: I agree that the university may use this information to contact me and provide admissions support.
consultation.privacy_note: Your information is protected and used only for consultation.
